delhi.notes: High vehicle density, strong enforcement infra, moderate industrial base

lucknow.notes: Significant construction dust, weaker enforcement, growing industrial

patna.notes: Higher industrial share, limited enforcement, biomass burning influence

_meta.description: Per-city scenario parameters for the AQI Control Environment. Source shares are configurable scenario parameters, not empirical claims. Compliance multiplier (0-1) models how effectively interventions translate to real-world reductions. Festival sensitivity scales PM2.5 amplification during Diwali/events.
_meta.source: Simplified profiles inspired by CPCB/NCAP city reports. Not empirical source-apportionment data.
